# cascade — The CSS-native, signal-driven, AI-first React design system

cascade is a copy-paste component library (shadcn model). Users own the code they install.
Components are signal-driven (Preact Signals), styled with modern CSS, WCAG 2.1 AA.

## Key resources

- Registry JSON: https://cascivo.com/registry.json
- View schema: https://cascivo.com/view.v1.json
- MCP server: npx @cascivo/mcp
- llms.txt: https://cascivo.com/llms.txt

## MCP tools

- `list_components` — list all components with category/tags
- `get_component` — full component manifest
- `scaffold_view` — natural language → JSON view config
- `validate_view` — validate a view config against the schema
- `add_to_project` — install components into the user project

## Context resources

The context layer provides machine-readable WHY — intent, boundaries, and closed-set tokens.

- Context bundle: https://cascivo.com/context.json
- Token catalog (closed set): https://cascivo.com/tokens.catalog.json
- Per-component context: https://cascivo.com/context/<name>.md

## How to select a component

Use the MCP `select_component` tool with a natural-language need:
  select_component({ need: "show a transient success message" })

Or browse the `related` edges in each component's intent:
  get_context({ name: "Toast" }) → returns intent.related edges to neighbours

New MCP tools:
- `get_tokens` — closed-set token catalog (filter by group/layer)
- `get_context` — full context for one component (intent + boundaries + tokens)
- `select_component` — deterministic ranking of components by need description

## Component authoring rules (for cascivo:extend)

- Signals only: `useSignal`, `useComputed`, `useSignalEffect` from `@cascivo/core`
- No `useState`, `useEffect`, `useContext`, `useLayoutEffect`, `useReducer`
- DOM side effects via `useSignalEffect`, not `useEffect`
- `useRef` only for DOM element references
- CSS custom properties only — no Tailwind, no inline styles, no CSS-in-JS
- Visual states (hover/focus/active) via CSS pseudo-classes — not JS
- `data-state` attributes only for states CSS cannot express (e.g. loading, error)
- FSM (`useMachine`) only when the component itself drives transitions
- CSS logical properties throughout (RTL-safe): `margin-inline-start`, etc.
- User-visible strings via `@cascivo/i18n` — no hardcoded English fallbacks
- WCAG 2.1 AA minimum — keyboard navigable, screen-reader tested

## Component index

- [accordion](/llms/accordion.md) — Vertically stacked, collapsible content sections
- [alert](/llms/alert.md) — Highlights a short, important message inline
- [alert-dialog](/llms/alert-dialog.md) — Confirmation dialog requiring explicit user action; no light-dismiss
- [app-shell](/llms/app-shell.md) — Sticky-header + full-height side-nav + single-scroll-container layout with an animated, accessible nav toggle.
- [aspect-ratio](/llms/aspect-ratio.md) — Constrains content to a fixed width-to-height ratio
- [avatar](/llms/avatar.md) — Displays a user image with initials fallback
- [avatar-group](/llms/avatar-group.md) — Overlapping stack of avatars with a max cap and an i18n-labelled +N overflow chip
- [badge](/llms/badge.md) — Small status label or category indicator
- [block/console-app](/llms/block/console-app.md) — Carbon-parity console shell: ShellHeader + icon-rail SideNav + HeaderPanel notifications/switcher + collapsible aside + main content.
- [block/dashboard-charts](/llms/block/dashboard-charts.md) — Dashboard layout with KPI tiles, line chart, bar chart, and pie chart.
- [block/empty-dashboard](/llms/block/empty-dashboard.md) — Dashboard page showing an empty state with a call-to-action button.
- [block/login-page](/llms/block/login-page.md) — Authentication login page with email and password form.
- [block/notification-center](/llms/block/notification-center.md) — A list of notification alerts with a mark-all-read action.
- [block/page-with-breadcrumb](/llms/block/page-with-breadcrumb.md) — A centered content page with a breadcrumb navigation and page header.
- [block/settings-form-page](/llms/block/settings-form-page.md) — Settings page with profile form inside a two-column settings layout.
- [block/sidebar-app](/llms/block/sidebar-app.md) — Full app shell with collapsible side navigation and top header.
- [block/stats-cards](/llms/block/stats-cards.md) — Grid of KPI stat cards with trend badges.
- [block/users-table-page](/llms/block/users-table-page.md) — Full users management page with table, search, and invite action.
- [blockquote](/llms/blockquote.md) — Quoted passage with optional attribution footer
- [breadcrumb](/llms/breadcrumb.md) — Shows the current page location within a navigation hierarchy
- [button](/llms/button.md) — Triggers an action or event
- [button-group](/llms/button-group.md) — Visually joins a set of related buttons into a single segmented control
- [calendar](/llms/calendar.md) — An accessible standalone month-grid date picker.
- [card](/llms/card.md) — Container for grouping related content
- [carousel](/llms/carousel.md) — Scroll-snap slide deck with previous/next controls and dot indicators
- [chart/area-chart](/llms/chart/area-chart.md) — Area chart with optional stacking, multi-series support, and hover tooltip.
- [chart/bar-chart](/llms/chart/bar-chart.md) — Bar chart with vertical/horizontal orientation, grouped or stacked modes, and multi-series support.
- [chart/boxplot](/llms/chart/boxplot.md) — Box-and-whisker plot with five-number summary and outlier dots per series.
- [chart/bubble-chart](/llms/chart/bubble-chart.md) — Bubble chart mapping x, y, and size dimensions; radius is area-proportional via sqrt scale.
- [chart/bullet](/llms/chart/bullet.md) — Bullet chart with background range bands, measure bar, and target tick.
- [chart/combo-chart](/llms/chart/combo-chart.md) — Combination bar + line chart on shared or dual y-axes.
- [chart/heatmap](/llms/chart/heatmap.md) — Two-dimensional heatmap with band scales and color-mix cell interpolation.
- [chart/histogram](/llms/chart/histogram.md) — Frequency histogram using Freedman–Diaconis binning with hover tooltips.
- [chart/kpi](/llms/chart/kpi.md) — KPI card showing a primary metric with optional delta indicator, icon, and sparkline.
- [chart/line-chart](/llms/chart/line-chart.md) — Time-series or numeric line chart with multi-series support, hover tooltip, and legend.
- [chart/meter](/llms/chart/meter.md) — Progress meter in bar or gauge variant with threshold coloring.
- [chart/pie-chart](/llms/chart/pie-chart.md) — Pie or donut chart with hover segments and optional legend.
- [chart/radar](/llms/chart/radar.md) — Radar / spider chart with polar grid rings, spokes, and multi-series polygon overlays.
- [chart/scatter-chart](/llms/chart/scatter-chart.md) — Scatter plot with variable point radius, multi-series, and hover tooltip.
- [chart/sparkline](/llms/chart/sparkline.md) — Compact inline sparkline for embedding trend data in dashboards or KPI cards.
- [chart/treemap](/llms/chart/treemap.md) — Squarified treemap for visualizing part-to-whole hierarchical data.
- [chat-bubble](/llms/chat-bubble.md) — Message bubble for chat and messaging UIs with avatar, name, and timestamp support
- [checkbox](/llms/checkbox.md) — Binary toggle for forms, with indeterminate support
- [checkbox-card](/llms/checkbox-card.md) — Multi-selectable card backed by a native checkbox. Use multiple independent CheckboxCards for multi-select scenarios.
- [code](/llms/code.md) — Inline code span for identifiers, commands, and short snippets
- [code-snippet](/llms/code-snippet.md) — Displays code (inline, single-line, or multi-line) with an optional copy button, lightweight built-in syntax highlighting for bash/css/js/ts, and an optional terminal-window look
- [collapsible](/llms/collapsible.md) — A single disclosure region toggled open and closed by its trigger
- [color-picker](/llms/color-picker.md) — Interactive color selection widget with saturation/lightness area, hue and alpha sliders
- [combobox](/llms/combobox.md) — Filterable single-select with an animated custom listbox, built on the dropdown open/close machine
- [command-menu](/llms/command-menu.md) — Cmd+K command palette with fuzzy search over grouped commands
- [contained-list](/llms/contained-list.md) — Labelled list of rows inside a bordered container
- [context-menu](/llms/context-menu.md) — Right-click context menu anchored at pointer coordinates via CSS custom properties
- [copy-button](/llms/copy-button.md) — Icon button that copies a value to the clipboard with copied feedback
- [data-list](/llms/data-list.md) — Key-value pairs rendered as a description list
- [data-table](/llms/data-table.md) — Signal-driven data table with client/server sort, filter, pagination, multi-selection, expandable rows, and CSS content-visibility row containment for large datasets
- [date-picker](/llms/date-picker.md) — An accessible date-picker with a calendar popover.
- [date-range-picker](/llms/date-range-picker.md) — A dual-calendar picker for selecting a contiguous date range.
- [dock](/llms/dock.md) — Fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile app shells with up to 5 items
- [drawer](/llms/drawer.md) — Edge-anchored dialog panel that slides in from a screen edge with CSS-only enter/exit motion
- [dropdown](/llms/dropdown.md) — Menu of actions revealed from a trigger
- [editable](/llms/editable.md) — Inline click-to-edit text field
- [empty-state](/llms/empty-state.md) — Placeholder for views that have no data to display
- [field](/llms/field.md) — Form-field wrapper composing label, control, description, and error
- [file-uploader](/llms/file-uploader.md) — Drag-and-drop file upload zone with file list and status indicators.
- [filter](/llms/filter.md) — A group of toggleable pill or outline buttons for filtering content by category
- [form](/llms/form.md) — Typed signal-based form store (createForm/useForm) with sync/async validation and a thin Form element wrapper
- [header](/llms/header.md) — App top bar with brand, primary navigation links, and an actions slot
- [header-panel](/llms/header-panel.md) — Non-modal panel anchored below the shell header at the inline-end edge — hosts notifications, app switcher, user settings
- [heading](/llms/heading.md) — Section heading with semantic level decoupled from visual size
- [hover-card](/llms/hover-card.md) — Hover-triggered popover with configurable open/close delay
- [icon-button](/llms/icon-button.md) — Square, icon-only button with a required accessible label
- [image](/llms/image.md) — Image with load state, blur-up placeholder, graceful fallback, and optional zoom
- [indicator](/llms/indicator.md) — Positions an overlay element (badge, dot, count) at a corner of its child
- [inline-loading](/llms/inline-loading.md) — Compact inline status indicator that pairs a label with a loading, success, or error state
- [input](/llms/input.md) — Text input field with optional label, hint, and error state
- [input-group](/llms/input-group.md) — Prefix/suffix addon wrapper for Input; InputGroupAddon renders inline icons/units inside the field border; ButtonGroup collapses adjacent button borders
- [item](/llms/item.md) — Generic content row primitive with media, content, and action regions
- [join](/llms/join.md) — Groups adjacent children into a seamless joined element by removing interior borders and radii
- [kbd](/llms/kbd.md) — Displays a keyboard key or shortcut
- [label](/llms/label.md) — Accessible caption for a form control
- [layout/app-shell](/llms/layout/app-shell.md) — Full-page application shell with persisted collapsible sidebar. Includes a signal-driven top progress bar with determinate progress, error state, and dismissible error strip.
- [layout/auth-layout](/llms/layout/auth-layout.md) — Centered card layout for authentication pages (login, register, forgot password).
- [layout/auto-grid](/llms/layout/auto-grid.md) — Media-query-free responsive grid — columns auto-fill based on available space.
- [layout/center](/llms/layout/center.md) — Horizontally centered container with a configurable max-width.
- [layout/columns](/llms/layout/columns.md) — Equal-width multi-column layout that collapses to single column on narrow viewports.
- [layout/dashboard-layout](/llms/layout/dashboard-layout.md) — Dashboard page layout with stats strip, main content area, and optional aside.
- [layout/grid](/llms/layout/grid.md) — CSS grid layout primitive with responsive column collapsing.
- [layout/masonry](/llms/layout/masonry.md) — Masonry layout — native CSS masonry where supported, multi-column fallback elsewhere (fallback orders items top-to-bottom per column).
- [layout/page-header](/llms/layout/page-header.md) — Page-level header with title, description, breadcrumb, and actions slots.
- [layout/section](/llms/layout/section.md) — Page-section shell with block padding, centered inner width, and stack gap.
- [layout/settings-layout](/llms/layout/settings-layout.md) — Two-column settings page layout with a fixed-width menu and fluid content area.
- [layout/spacer](/llms/layout/spacer.md) — Fixed-height spacing block using design token steps.
- [layout/split-view](/llms/layout/split-view.md) — Resizable two-pane split layout with keyboard and pointer drag support.
- [layout/stack](/llms/layout/stack.md) — Flex layout primitive for vertical or horizontal stacking with gap control.
- [link](/llms/link.md) — Styled anchor for navigation, standalone or inline within prose
- [list](/llms/list.md) — Styled unordered or ordered list with ListItem
- [menu](/llms/menu.md) — Dropdown menu with keyboard navigation, built on usePopover
- [menu-button](/llms/menu-button.md) — A button that opens an anchored action menu of one-shot commands
- [menubar](/llms/menubar.md) — Horizontal application menu bar with keyboard-navigable dropdown menus
- [modal](/llms/modal.md) — Accessible dialog overlay using native <dialog> element
- [multi-select](/llms/multi-select.md) — Searchable multi-value select with popover listbox
- [native-select](/llms/native-select.md) — A styled native <select> that keeps platform form/keyboard behavior with a custom chevron and focus ring
- [navigation-menu](/llms/navigation-menu.md) — Site navigation bar with links and dropdown flyout panels
- [notification](/llms/notification.md) — Inline, actionable notification banner that surfaces a titled message with an optional recovery action
- [number-input](/llms/number-input.md) — Numeric input with stepper buttons, clamping, precision, and locale formatting
- [otp-input](/llms/otp-input.md) — Segmented one-time code input
- [overflow-menu](/llms/overflow-menu.md) — Kebab icon button revealing a menu of row-level actions
- [pagination](/llms/pagination.md) — Controls for navigating paged data sets, with page size selection
- [password-input](/llms/password-input.md) — Password input with reveal toggle and optional strength meter
- [popover](/llms/popover.md) — Anchored floating panel built on CSS Anchor Positioning + Popover API
- [progress](/llms/progress.md) — Horizontal bar showing the completion progress of a tracked operation
- [progress-bar](/llms/progress-bar.md) — Shows determinate or indeterminate progress of a task
- [progress-circle](/llms/progress-circle.md) — Circular determinate progress indicator rendered as an SVG arc
- [progress-indicator](/llms/progress-indicator.md) — Shows progress through the steps of a multi-step flow
- [prose](/llms/prose.md) — Wrapper that styles raw descendant HTML — headings, lists, code, quotes, tables
- [radial-progress](/llms/radial-progress.md) — Circular progress indicator using conic-gradient, with percentage label and variant colors
- [radio](/llms/radio.md) — Single choice from a set, grouped with RadioGroup
- [radio-card](/llms/radio-card.md) — Selectable card backed by a native radio input. Use RadioCardGroup for single-select groups.
- [rating-group](/llms/rating-group.md) — Star rating input with accessible radio group pattern
- [resizable](/llms/resizable.md) — Two-pane splitter whose divider can be dragged or keyboard-nudged to reallocate space
- [scroll-area](/llms/scroll-area.md) — A scroll container with styled, slim scrollbars and overflow shadows
- [search](/llms/search.md) — Search input with debounced search callback and clear button
- [section/cta](/llms/section/cta.md) — Call-to-action band — quiet hairline-bordered section with title, description, and centered actions. Replace demo content before shipping.
- [section/feature-grid](/llms/section/feature-grid.md) — Feature section — AutoGrid of items with optional title, description, and icon slots. Icons are optional; the grid works text-only. Replace demo content before shipping.
- [section/hero](/llms/section/hero.md) — Page hero section — centered or split layout with eyebrow, title, description, actions and media slots. Replace demo content before shipping.
- [section/media-masonry](/llms/section/media-masonry.md) — Masonry gallery section — native CSS masonry where supported, multi-column fallback elsewhere (fallback orders tiles top-to-bottom per column). Tiles style themselves; section provides only the layout shell.
- [section/page-footer](/llms/section/page-footer.md) — Site footer — AutoGrid of link groups with a brand/meta bottom row. Renders a <footer> element with a <nav aria-label="Footer"> wrapping the link columns.
- [section/stats-band](/llms/section/stats-band.md) — KPI strip — horizontal band of stats with optional delta and inline sparkline trend. Wraps via AutoGrid on narrow containers. No visible heading; provide aria-label for accessibility.
- [segmented-control](/llms/segmented-control.md) — Mutually exclusive toggle group
- [select](/llms/select.md) — Native select menu styled to match the design system
- [separator](/llms/separator.md) — Visual or semantic divider between content
- [sheet](/llms/sheet.md) — Slide-in panel from any edge, using popover=manual and @starting-style animations
- [shell-header](/llms/shell-header.md) — Console application header: brand with prefix, dropdown nav menus, global icon actions, hamburger, skip-to-content
- [side-nav](/llms/side-nav.md) — Collapsible sidebar navigation with optional icons and one level of grouping
- [skeleton](/llms/skeleton.md) — Animated loading placeholder that mirrors the shape of pending content
- [skip-nav](/llms/skip-nav.md) — Skip link that jumps keyboard users past the navigation to the main content
- [slider](/llms/slider.md) — Range input for selecting a value within bounds
- [spinner](/llms/spinner.md) — Indeterminate loading indicator
- [stack](/llms/stack.md) — Overlaps children in a CSS grid stack with a configurable offset to create a card-pile effect
- [stat](/llms/stat.md) — Displays a key metric with optional delta, trend direction and help text
- [status](/llms/status.md) — Colored dot with a label communicating the state of a system or entity
- [steps](/llms/steps.md) — Visual progress indicator for multi-step flows with horizontal and vertical orientations
- [structured-list](/llms/structured-list.md) — Tabular row list for scannable data, optionally single-selectable
- [swap](/llms/swap.md) — Animated toggle between two icon/content states with rotate or flip transition
- [switcher](/llms/switcher.md) — App/product switcher list — lives inside HeaderPanel, renders links with active indicator and optional dividers
- [tabs](/llms/tabs.md) — Switch between related panels of content
- [tag](/llms/tag.md) — Compact chip for labeling, categorizing, or filtering content
- [tags-input](/llms/tags-input.md) — Free-form multi-value chip input
- [text](/llms/text.md) — Body text with size, weight, and muted variants
- [textarea](/llms/textarea.md) — Multi-line text input with optional label, hint, and error state
- [tile](/llms/tile.md) — A selectable card with radio (single) or checkbox (multi) semantics, toggled by click or keyboard
- [time-picker](/llms/time-picker.md) — Native time input wrapper with label, hint, error, and size variants
- [timeline](/llms/timeline.md) — Ordered sequence of events with status markers and a connector line
- [toast](/llms/toast.md) — Transient notification surfaced via the useToast hook
- [toc](/llms/toc.md) — Table of contents with scroll-spy highlighting of the active section
- [toggle](/llms/toggle.md) — On/off switch built as an accessible button
- [toggle-group](/llms/toggle-group.md) — A set of toggle buttons for single or multiple selection
- [toggletip](/llms/toggletip.md) — A click-triggered info popover for supplementary, selectable content
- [tooltip](/llms/tooltip.md) — Contextual label shown on hover or focus
- [tree-view](/llms/tree-view.md) — Hierarchical, expandable tree of nodes with keyboard navigation and selection
- [user](/llms/user.md) — Identity composite: an avatar with a name, description, and optional action slot
- [visually-hidden](/llms/visually-hidden.md) — Hides content visually while keeping it available to screen readers

## Component intent summaries

- [Accordion](/context/accordion.md) — Use when: Progressively disclosing sections of related content the user reads top to bottom
- [Alert](/context/alert.md) — Use when: Surfacing a persistent, contextual message inline within a view (warning, error, info, success)
- [AlertDialog](/context/alert-dialog.md) — Use when: Confirming a destructive or irreversible action (delete, overwrite, sign out) before it happens
- [AppShell](/context/app-shell.md) — Use when: Building an application screen with a persistent header and side navigation
- [AspectRatio](/context/aspect-ratio.md) — Use when: Reserving a stable box for media that loads asynchronously, avoiding layout shift
- [Avatar](/context/avatar.md) — Use when: Representing a person or entity with a thumbnail image and initials fallback
- [AvatarGroup](/context/avatar-group.md) — Use when: Showing several people compactly as an overlapping stack (collaborators, attendees, reviewers)
- [Badge](/context/badge.md) — Use when: Labeling an item with a short, static status or category (e.g. "New", "Beta")
- [ConsoleApp](/context/block/console-app.md) — Use when: A Carbon-parity console shell with icon-rail nav, header panels, and aside
- [DashboardCharts](/context/block/dashboard-charts.md) — Use when: A prebuilt dashboard with KPI tiles, line, bar, and pie charts
- [EmptyDashboard](/context/block/empty-dashboard.md) — Use when: A first-run or zero-data dashboard with an empty state and primary CTA
- [LoginPage](/context/block/login-page.md) — Use when: A complete login page with email and password form
- [NotificationCenter](/context/block/notification-center.md) — Use when: A list of notification alerts with a mark-all-read action
- [PageWithBreadcrumb](/context/block/page-with-breadcrumb.md) — Use when: A centered content page with breadcrumb navigation and a page header
- [SettingsFormPage](/context/block/settings-form-page.md) — Use when: A settings page with a profile form inside a two-column settings layout
- [SidebarApp](/context/block/sidebar-app.md) — Use when: A ready-made app shell with opinionated collapsible sidebar and top header
- [StatsCards](/context/block/stats-cards.md) — Use when: A grid of KPI stat cards with trend badges
- [UsersTablePage](/context/block/users-table-page.md) — Use when: A full user-management page with table, search, and invite action
- [Blockquote](/context/blockquote.md) — Use when: Setting off a quoted passage from another source with visual emphasis
- [Breadcrumb](/context/breadcrumb.md) — Use when: Showing the user where the current page sits in a navigation hierarchy
- [Button](/context/button.md) — Use when: Triggering an action or navigation the user initiates by click/press
- [ButtonGroup](/context/button-group.md) — Use when: Presenting several related, independent actions that read as one control (e.g. an editor toolbar)
- [Calendar](/context/calendar.md) — Use when: Showing an always-visible month grid for picking a single date (inline, not a popover)
- [Card](/context/card.md) — Use when: Grouping related content into a visually distinct surface with border/shadow
- [Carousel](/context/carousel.md) — Use when: Presenting a sequence of media or cards the user pages through one at a time
- [AreaChart](/context/chart/area-chart.md) — Use when: Showing cumulative volume or magnitude of a trend over continuous time
- [BarChart](/context/chart/bar-chart.md) — Use when: Comparing discrete categorical values across groups
- [Boxplot](/context/chart/boxplot.md) — Use when: Comparing the distribution spread, median, and quartiles across groups
- [BubbleChart](/context/chart/bubble-chart.md) — Use when: Plotting three dimensions at once — x, y, and a size-encoded magnitude
- [Bullet](/context/chart/bullet.md) — Use when: Showing a single measure against a target with qualitative range bands
- [ComboChart](/context/chart/combo-chart.md) — Use when: Overlaying two related metrics with different scales (e.g. volume bars + rate line)
- [Heatmap](/context/chart/heatmap.md) — Use when: Showing magnitude across two categorical dimensions as a color-coded matrix
- [Histogram](/context/chart/histogram.md) — Use when: Showing the frequency distribution of a single continuous variable
- [Kpi](/context/chart/kpi.md) — Use when: Highlighting a single headline metric with an optional change delta
- [LineChart](/context/chart/line-chart.md) — Use when: Showing trends and precise values over continuous time or a numeric range
- [Meter](/context/chart/meter.md) — Use when: Showing a rated or gauged value within a known min/max range
- [PieChart](/context/chart/pie-chart.md) — Use when: Showing part-of-whole proportions with five or fewer slices
- [Radar](/context/chart/radar.md) — Use when: Comparing several entities across the same set of quantitative dimensions
- [ScatterChart](/context/chart/scatter-chart.md) — Use when: Revealing correlation or clustering between two numeric variables
- [Sparkline](/context/chart/sparkline.md) — Use when: Embedding a compact micro-trend inline in text, tables, or KPI cards
- [Treemap](/context/chart/treemap.md) — Use when: Showing part-to-whole proportions across many segments in a compact area
- [ChatBubble](/context/chat-bubble.md) — Use when: Chat UIs and messaging features showing conversation history
- [Checkbox](/context/checkbox.md) — Use when: Selecting zero or more options from a list where each choice is independent
- [CheckboxCard](/context/checkbox-card.md) — Use when: Multi-select where each option needs a title and supporting description (feature toggles, add-ons)
- [Code](/context/code.md) — Use when: Marking up an inline identifier, command, path, or token within prose
- [CodeSnippet](/context/code-snippet.md) — Use when: Showing a command, token, or path the user is expected to copy
- [Collapsible](/context/collapsible.md) — Use when: Hiding a single secondary block until the user asks for it
- [ColorPicker](/context/color-picker.md) — Use when: Letting a user choose an arbitrary color via a visual saturation/lightness area plus hue control
- [Combobox](/context/combobox.md) — Use when: Single-select from a long list where type-to-filter makes finding an option faster
- [CommandMenu](/context/command-menu.md) — Use when: Giving power users a global Cmd/Ctrl+K palette to search and run actions or navigate
- [ContainedList](/context/contained-list.md) — Use when: Grouping a short set of related rows under a visible heading in a bordered surface
- [ContextMenu](/context/context-menu.md) — Use when: Offering actions contextual to an element via right-click (rename, delete, copy on a row or canvas item)
- [CopyButton](/context/copy-button.md) — Use when: Letting users copy a short value to the clipboard — install commands, API keys, tokens, share links
- [DataList](/context/data-list.md) — Use when: Displaying read-only key-value metadata (profile fields, record summaries)
- [DataTable](/context/data-table.md) — Use when: Displaying tabular data with columns the user sorts, filters, or pages through
- [DatePicker](/context/date-picker.md) — Use when: Picking a single calendar date in a form where a visual month grid helps (due dates, bookings)
- [DateRangePicker](/context/date-range-picker.md) — Use when: Selecting a contiguous start–end date range (reporting windows, bookings, filters)
- [Dock](/context/dock.md) — Use when: Mobile app-shell navigation with 3–5 top-level destinations
- [Drawer](/context/drawer.md) — Use when: A side or edge panel for navigation, filters, or detail views that needs full-height space
- [Dropdown](/context/dropdown.md) — Use when: Revealing a short menu of actions from a trigger button (row actions, "More" overflow, account menu)
- [Editable](/context/editable.md) — Use when: Editing a single piece of text in place where the value is normally read-only — titles, names, labels
- [EmptyState](/context/empty-state.md) — Use when: Filling a view that has no data with guidance and a primary next step
- [Field](/context/field.md) — Use when: Pairing a single control with its label, helper text, and validation message
- [FileUploader](/context/file-uploader.md) — Use when: Letting users attach one or more files via click-to-browse or drag-and-drop
- [Filter](/context/filter.md) — Use when: Tag or category filtering on listing pages where the active filters must remain visible
- [Form](/context/form.md) — Use when: Collecting and submitting a set of related field values together
- [Header](/context/header.md) — Use when: Providing a simple marketing or app top bar with brand, links, and actions
- [HeaderPanel](/context/header-panel.md) — Use when: Hosting a non-modal panel anchored under the shell header (notifications, switcher, settings)
- [Heading](/context/heading.md) — Use when: Titling a page or section as part of the document outline
- [HoverCard](/context/hover-card.md) — Use when: Showing a rich preview (avatar, summary, links) when a user hovers or focuses a trigger
- [IconButton](/context/icon-button.md) — Use when: A compact, recognizable action where an icon alone communicates intent (close, edit, more)
- [Image](/context/image.md) — Use when: Displaying a content image that should show a placeholder while loading and degrade gracefully on error
- [Indicator](/context/indicator.md) — Use when: Notification counts on icon buttons
- [InlineLoading](/context/inline-loading.md) — Use when: Showing the progress of a single inline action — a Save button that becomes "Saving… / Saved / Failed"
- [Input](/context/input.md) — Use when: Collecting a single line of free-form text from the user
- [InputGroup](/context/input-group.md) — Use when: Attaching a prefix/suffix addon (protocol, currency, unit) to an Input so it reads as one field
- [Item](/context/item.md) — Use when: Composing a single content row with leading media, a text block, and trailing actions
- [Join](/context/join.md) — Use when: Input + button search groups where the two controls should appear as one unit
- [Kbd](/context/kbd.md) — Use when: Showing a keyboard key or shortcut the user should press
- [Label](/context/label.md) — Use when: Naming a single form control (input, select, checkbox) so clicking the text focuses it
- [AppShell](/context/layout/app-shell.md) — Use when: A full-page application frame with header, collapsible sidebar, and content
- [AuthLayout](/context/layout/auth-layout.md) — Use when: Centered card layout for authentication pages — login, register, reset
- [AutoGrid](/context/layout/auto-grid.md) — Use when: Responsive card or tile grids that auto-fit columns to available width
- [Center](/context/layout/center.md) — Use when: Horizontally centering content within a configurable max-width
- [Columns](/context/layout/columns.md) — Use when: Equal-width multi-column content that collapses to one column when narrow
- [DashboardLayout](/context/layout/dashboard-layout.md) — Use when: A dashboard page with a stats strip, main content area, and optional aside
- [Grid](/context/layout/grid.md) — Use when: Two-dimensional layouts with an explicit column count
- [Masonry](/context/layout/masonry.md) — Use when: Galleries of variable-height items packed into balanced columns
- [PageHeader](/context/layout/page-header.md) — Use when: A page-level header with title, description, breadcrumb, and action slots
- [Section](/context/layout/section.md) — Use when: Wrapping a page region with block padding and a centered inner width
- [SettingsLayout](/context/layout/settings-layout.md) — Use when: A two-column settings page with a fixed-width menu and fluid content
- [Spacer](/context/layout/spacer.md) — Use when: Inserting a fixed vertical gap between blocks using spacing token steps
- [SplitView](/context/layout/split-view.md) — Use when: Two side-by-side panes the user can resize via pointer or keyboard
- [Stack](/context/layout/stack.md) — Use when: Arranging children vertically or horizontally with a consistent gap
- [Link](/context/link.md) — Use when: Navigating to another page, view, or resource via a real href
- [List](/context/list.md) — Use when: Presenting a set of related items as a bulleted or numbered list
- [Menu](/context/menu.md) — Use when: Presenting a list of actions or commands triggered from a button
- [MenuButton](/context/menu-button.md) — Use when: Exposing a small set of one-shot actions behind a single labeled button
- [Menubar](/context/menubar.md) — Use when: A persistent application-style command bar (File / Edit / View) where each top-level entry opens a menu of actions
- [Modal](/context/modal.md) — Use when: Presenting focused content or a task that must interrupt the current flow
- [MultiSelect](/context/multi-select.md) — Use when: Selecting several values at once from a known list of options
- [NativeSelect](/context/native-select.md) — Use when: A standard single-choice dropdown where native behavior and form integration matter most
- [NavigationMenu](/context/navigation-menu.md) — Use when: Primary site navigation where some destinations are plain links and others reveal a flyout of grouped links
- [Notification](/context/notification.md) — Use when: Surfacing a prominent, often actionable message in the page flow (sync result, failed upload, available update)
- [NumberInput](/context/number-input.md) — Use when: Collecting a bounded numeric value where increment/decrement by a known step is natural (quantity, opacity, count)
- [OtpInput](/context/otp-input.md) — Use when: Entering a fixed-length one-time code (2FA, SMS verification, email confirmation) split across per-character slots
- [OverflowMenu](/context/overflow-menu.md) — Use when: Collapsing secondary row-level or item-level actions behind a kebab trigger in dense layouts like tables and lists
- [Pagination](/context/pagination.md) — Use when: Navigating between pages of a paged dataset
- [PasswordInput](/context/password-input.md) — Use when: Collecting a secret credential that should be masked by default with an opt-in reveal toggle
- [Popover](/context/popover.md) — Use when: Showing rich, interactive content anchored to a trigger that the user must explicitly open by clicking
- [Progress](/context/progress.md) — Use when: Tracked operations with a known total (file uploads, multi-step imports)
- [ProgressBar](/context/progress-bar.md) — Use when: Showing linear determinate progress of a task with a known percentage (value)
- [ProgressCircle](/context/progress-circle.md) — Use when: Showing determinate progress compactly as a circular arc
- [ProgressIndicator](/context/progress-indicator.md) — Use when: Showing progress through the discrete steps of a multi-step flow (wizard, checkout)
- [Prose](/context/prose.md) — Use when: Styling long-form authored content (articles, docs, CMS output)
- [RadialProgress](/context/radial-progress.md) — Use when: Dashboard KPI metrics showing completion percentage
- [Radio](/context/radio.md) — Use when: Choosing exactly one option from a small, mutually exclusive set (roughly 2–6) where all options should stay visible
- [RadioCard](/context/radio-card.md) — Use when: Single-select from a few options where each choice needs a title plus supporting description (plans, tiers, shipping methods)
- [RatingGroup](/context/rating-group.md) — Use when: Capturing a discrete subjective rating on a small fixed scale (e.g. 1–5 stars)
- [Resizable](/context/resizable.md) — Use when: Letting users reallocate space between two adjacent regions, e.g. an editor and a preview
- [ScrollArea](/context/scroll-area.md) — Use when: Constraining a region to a fixed height/width with overflow scrolling
- [Search](/context/search.md) — Use when: A query field that filters or searches content, with a built-in clear button and debounced onSearch
- [Cta](/context/section/cta.md) — Use when: A call-to-action band with title, description, and centered actions
- [FeatureGrid](/context/section/feature-grid.md) — Use when: A feature section laying out items in an auto-fitting grid
- [Hero](/context/section/hero.md) — Use when: The primary page intro with eyebrow, title, description, actions, and media
- [MediaMasonry](/context/section/media-masonry.md) — Use when: A full-width media gallery section with masonry packing
- [PageFooter](/context/section/page-footer.md) — Use when: A site footer with grouped link columns and a brand/meta bottom row
- [StatsBand](/context/section/stats-band.md) — Use when: A horizontal KPI strip with optional deltas and inline sparkline trends
- [SegmentedControl](/context/segmented-control.md) — Use when: A compact inline single choice among a few mutually exclusive options (2–5) such as view modes or time ranges
- [Select](/context/select.md) — Use when: Choosing exactly one value from a known, finite list inside a form
- [Separator](/context/separator.md) — Use when: Dividing groups of content within a section or menu
- [Sheet](/context/sheet.md) — Use when: Showing secondary content or a form in a panel that slides in from a screen edge
- [ShellHeader](/context/shell-header.md) — Use when: Building console/admin app chrome with brand, dropdown nav, and global icon actions
- [SideNav](/context/side-nav.md) — Use when: Persistent primary navigation along the side of an app shell
- [Skeleton](/context/skeleton.md) — Use when: Indicating loading by mirroring the shape of the content that will appear
- [SkipNav](/context/skip-nav.md) — Use when: Letting keyboard users jump past repeated navigation to the main content
- [Slider](/context/slider.md) — Use when: Selecting a value within a continuous or stepped numeric range where approximate adjustment is fine
- [Spinner](/context/spinner.md) — Use when: Indicating indeterminate work where duration and progress are unknown
- [Stack](/context/stack.md) — Use when: Card pile UI where depth and layering should be visible
- [Stat](/context/stat.md) — Use when: Highlighting a single key metric with a clear label
- [Status](/context/status.md) — Use when: Communicating the live state of a system or entity (operational, deploying, down)
- [Steps](/context/steps.md) — Use when: Checkout flows where the user moves through a fixed sequence of screens
- [StructuredList](/context/structured-list.md) — Use when: Presenting a set of related records in aligned columns the user scans top to bottom
- [Swap](/context/swap.md) — Use when: Theme toggles where an icon animates between two states (sun/moon)
- [Switcher](/context/switcher.md) — Use when: Listing sibling apps/products the user can switch between
- [Tabs](/context/tabs.md) — Use when: Switching between peer panels of related content in the same context
- [Tag](/context/tag.md) — Use when: Labeling, categorizing, or filtering content with a compact chip
- [TagsInput](/context/tags-input.md) — Use when: Collecting an open-ended set of free-text values the user types themselves (keywords, emails, labels)
- [Text](/context/text.md) — Use when: Rendering body copy, paragraphs, and inline text in app UI
- [Textarea](/context/textarea.md) — Use when: Capturing multi-line free text such as messages, descriptions, or comments
- [Tile](/context/tile.md) — Use when: A visually rich, clickable choice card in a single- or multi-select group
- [TimePicker](/context/time-picker.md) — Use when: Capturing a time of day (HH:mm) in a form, such as a meeting or reminder time
- [Timeline](/context/timeline.md) — Use when: Showing an ordered sequence of events over time (activity feeds, order tracking)
- [Toast](/context/toast.md) — Use when: Confirming that a background or just-completed action succeeded or failed (e.g. "Saved")
- [Toc](/context/toc.md) — Use when: Long-form pages (docs, articles) that benefit from in-page jump links
- [Toggle](/context/toggle.md) — Use when: Flipping a single binary setting that takes effect immediately (e.g. notifications on/off)
- [ToggleGroup](/context/toggle-group.md) — Use when: Choosing one value from a small, mutually exclusive set that should stay visible (type="single")
- [Toggletip](/context/toggletip.md) — Use when: Revealing brief supplementary information on demand when the user clicks an info affordance
- [Tooltip](/context/tooltip.md) — Use when: Labeling an icon-only control or clarifying a terse element on hover or focus
- [TreeView](/context/tree-view.md) — Use when: Showing nested, parent/child data the user expands and collapses (file trees, org charts, nav)
- [User](/context/user.md) — Use when: Showing a person with their name and a secondary line (email, role) next to an avatar
- [VisuallyHidden](/context/visually-hidden.md) — Use when: Giving an icon-only control an accessible name without showing text

_Generated: 2026-06-19 from registry v0.0.0_
